visual.name: p6XERPortfolioAnalyzer
visual.description: Load one or many Primavera P6 XER files directly into Power BI — no converter, no gateway. Delivers four analysis panels: Executive Dashboard, Project Overview (WBS hierarchy), Interactive Gantt Chart, and DCMA 14-Point Schedule Assessment. Supports local folders, network shares, SharePoint, and OneDrive.

dataRoles.name: xerFiles
dataRoles.description: Drag the 'XER Files' text column from your Power Query here. Each row is one chunk of one XER file. Multiple files (e.g. from a folder query) are all parsed and merged into one view.

dataRoles.name: projectName
dataRoles.description: Drag the 'Project Name' text column from your Power Query here. This field enables cross-visual filtering — connect a slicer or another visual on Project Name to filter this visual automatically.

dataRoles.name: xerFileName
dataRoles.description: Drag the 'XER File Name' text column from your Power Query here. Enables the XER File Name filter inside the visual so you can filter by individual source file.
